title: Emergency Measures Act
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|Darth Caedus' act|[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Emergency Powers Act/Legends|Emergency Powers Act]]}}
The '''Emergency Measures Act''' was an act created by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] to grant powers to the [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]].

Used by [[Cal Omas]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], it allowed him and his top advisors, [[Cha Niathal]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], power to do whatever necessary for the good of the Alliance.

Solo manipulated [[Article Five, Sub-section C27]] of this document with the aid of a [[legal analyst droid]] named [[HM-3]] to great effect, first to obtain materials from [[Defense Procurement and Supply Agency|Galactic Alliance Procurement]] that he could not request unless through the consent of another higher power. Solo then ordered [[Biris J. Te Gaf]]'s assignment onboard the ship with the most [[Laser cannon/Legends|cannon]] misfires in the fleet, the [[Ocean (starship)|''Ocean'']].

This amendment also allowed the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] to detain any individuals suspect of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] without a warrant, and have their assets frozen per the [[Treasury Orders Act]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
